NOT_FOUND: The requested resource was not found.
ROUTE_NOT_FOUND: The requested endpoint does not exist.
VALIDATION_ERROR: The submitted data is invalid. Please check your input.
UNAUTHORIZED: You must be logged in to perform this action.
FORBIDDEN: You do not have permission to perform this action.
CONFLICT: A conflict occurred. The resource may already exist.
INTERNAL_ERROR: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
INVALID_CREDENTIALS: The email address or password is incorrect.
SELF_DEACTIVATION: You cannot deactivate your own account.
LAST_ADMIN: Cannot remove the last admin from the system.
OIDC_NOT_CONFIGURED: Single sign-on is not configured for this instance.
OIDC_ERROR: An error occurred during single sign-on. Please try again.
EMAIL_CONFLICT: An account with this email address already exists.
CIRCULAR_DEPENDENCY: This would create a circular dependency.
CATEGORY_IN_USE: This category is in use and cannot be deleted.
VENDOR_IN_USE: This vendor is in use and cannot be deleted.
BUDGET_SOURCE_IN_USE: This budget source is in use and cannot be deleted.
DISCRETIONARY_SOURCE: The discretionary budget source cannot be deleted.
SUBSIDY_PROGRAM_IN_USE: This subsidy program is in use and cannot be deleted.
SUBSIDY_OVERSUBSCRIBED: This subsidy program is already fully subscribed.
BUDGET_LINE_IN_USE: This budget line is linked to an invoice and cannot be deleted.
PAPERLESS_NOT_CONFIGURED: The document management integration is not configured.
PAPERLESS_UNREACHABLE: The document management system could not be reached.
PAPERLESS_ERROR: An error occurred while communicating with the document management system.
MUTUALLY_EXCLUSIVE_BUDGET_LINK: This budget line is already linked to a different invoice.
ITEMIZED_SUM_EXCEEDS_INVOICE: The sum of itemized amounts exceeds the invoice total.
BUDGET_LINE_ALREADY_LINKED: This budget line is already linked to an invoice.
RATE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED: Too many requests. Please wait a moment before trying again.
ACCOUNT_LOCKED: This account has been temporarily locked due to too many failed login attempts.
INVALID_ENTRY_TYPE: This diary entry type is not allowed for this operation.
IMMUTABLE_ENTRY: This diary entry cannot be modified.
